tools.name: search
tools.description: Live web search. Returns results with title, url, and snippet.

tools.name: news
tools.description: Recent news for a query/niche. Returns items with title, url, snippet, date, source.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Fetch a web page and return clean main-content text (no nav/ads/boilerplate).

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Summarize text OR a web page (give text or url). style: paragraph|bullets.

tools.name: repurpose
tools.description: Turn text into social assets: thread, summary, titles, hashtags.

tools.name: script
tools.description: Write a short-form video script (hook, beats, cta) for a topic.

tools.name: moderate
tools.description: Content-safety classification: flagged?, categories, severity, reason.

tools.name: media_info
tools.description: Metadata (title, duration, uploader, views) for a media URL — no download.

tools.name: voiceover
tools.description: Text -> natural MP3 narration. Returns a download URL.

tools.name: package_post
tools.description: Platform-optimized title, description, and hashtags for a clip.

tools.name: transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio/video URL to timestamped text. Premium (via x402).

tools.name: subtitles
tools.description: Audio/video URL -> .srt/.vtt subtitle file. Premium (via x402).

tools.name: find_clips
tools.description: Find viral clip candidates in a long video with scores. Premium (via x402).

tools.name: edit_clip
tools.description: Cut a time range into a finished 9:16 captioned short. Premium (via x402).

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search, extract · Private data: subtitles · Public sink: package_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search, extract · Private data: subtitles · Public sink: package_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
